generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring the horizontal displacement of the hoist in the crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTransmission
]
instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed affecting the crane’s motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedTransmission
]
instance CartMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder providing feedback on the cart motor position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartEncoderTransmission
]
instance HoistMotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder providing feedback on the hoist motor position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistEncoderTransmission
]
instance ArduinoTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor on the Arduino microcontroller monitoring its temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoTemperatureTransmission
]
instance ArduinoStatusSignal : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Status signal from the Arduino microcontroller indicating operational state"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoStatusTransmission
]

// Data Transmitted Instances
instance SwingAngleTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]
instance CartEncoderTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorEncoder
]
instance HoistEncoderTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorEncoder
]
instance ArduinoTemperatureTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoTemperatureSensor
]
instance ArduinoStatusTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoStatusSignal
]

// Data Instances
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of the cart‑hoist swing angle recorded by the encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of wind speed measured by the anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, WindSpeedObservationModel
]
instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of cart motor position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartEncoderTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, KinematicTransformationModel
]
instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of hoist motor position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistEncoderTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, KinematicTransformationModel
]
instance ArduinoTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data of Arduino temperature"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoTemperatureTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance ArduinoStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series status signals from the Arduino controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoStatusTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// Model Instances
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry model of the gantry crane derived from Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorToolEnabler, SimulationToolEnabler
]
instance KinematicTransformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic transformation matrices linking cart and hoist positions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorToolEnabler, SimulationToolEnabler
]
instance TrajectoryOptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Optimal control model for zero‑swing trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorToolEnabler
]
instance DynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation of the crane dynamics for cart and hoist"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationToolEnabler
]
instance ValidationDistanceMetricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Continuous‑validation distance metric and threshold model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationToolEnabler
]
instance WindSpeedObservationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model mapping wind speed sensor data to anticipated sway dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationToolEnabler
]
instance SwingAngleObservationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model mapping swing‑angle sensor data to observed motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationToolEnabler
]
instance FaultClassificationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Time‑series classifier model that labels faults for maintenance scheduling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationToolEnabler
]

// Enabler Instances
instance PythonEnvironmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python interpreter environment with gantrylib library used by all container services"
]
instance DockerComposeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker‑compose orchestrator managing container deployment"
]
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker over TCP used for inter‑container communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, OperatorInterfaceService
]
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for time‑series storage of telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]
instance VisualizationGrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboards for real‑time visualization of telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance TrajectoryGeneratorToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib library enabling trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]
instance SimulationToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python simulation library enabling dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance ValidationToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python continuous‑validation library enabling comparison of measurements and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]
instance ControlGUIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python GUI acting as operator interface for configuration and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorInterfaceService, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]
instance ArduinoIDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino IDE and libraries for firmware development"
]
instance KiCadDesignToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for custom shield design"
]
instance CapellaModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella Arcadia modelling repository"
]
instance GitHubRepoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository hosting source code, model assets, and documentation"
]

// Service Instances
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates optimal zero‑swing trajectories for cart and hoist based on user‑defined horizons and wind‑speed thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanInsight, GenerateTrajectoryAction
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs physics‑based simulations of the crane dynamics from CAD geometry and kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationDataInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares real‑time measurements against simulated trajectories, computing distance metrics, and triggers alerts when thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight, AdjustControllerTuningAction, StopCraneAction
]
instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that logs telemetry data into TimescaleDB and supports historical data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight, HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that serves Grafana dashboards for real‑time data visualization and trend monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardInsight
]
instance OperatorInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python GUI enabling operators to adjust parameters, view alerts, and initiate control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorConfigurationInsight, OperatorAlertInsight, PerformControlAction
]

// Action Instances
instance GenerateTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator or system action to generate a new trajectory plan"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustControllerTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator action to adjust controller tuning parameters for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance StopCraneAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency action to stop the crane immediately in response to severe deviation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance PerformControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generic action to send control commands to the physical crane interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Insight Instances
instance TrajectoryPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing the planned trajectory setpoints for cart and hoist motors"
]
instance SimulationDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying simulated trajectory and state data for comparison with real measurements"
]
instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight notifying operators that the continuous‑validation metric has exceeded predefined thresholds"
]
instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing the historical telemetry logs stored in TimescaleDB"
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing access to historical data trends for performance analysis"
]
instance DashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight representing real‑time Grafana dashboards"
]
instance OperatorConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing the current configuration settings in the operator interface"
]
instance OperatorAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight alerting operators to anomalies detected by the validation service or other components"
]
instance MaintenanceScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing maintenance scheduling based on fault label predictions"
]

// Component Instances
instance PhysicalCraneContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Physical Crane Interface communicating with Arduino"
]
instance TrajectoryGeneratorContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Trajectory Generator Service"
]
instance SimulationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Simulation Service"
]
instance ValidationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Continuous Validation Service"
]
instance LoggingContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Logging Service"
]
instance VisualizationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Grafana Visualization Service"
]
instance OperatorInterfaceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Python GUI Operator Interface"
]
instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker"
]
instance TimescaleDBContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running the TimescaleDB database"
]
instance GrafanaContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container running Grafana dashboards"
]

// Environment Instance
instance CranePhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCraneContainer, TrajectoryGeneratorContainer, SimulationContainer, ValidationContainer, LoggingContainer, VisualizationContainer, OperatorInterfaceContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer, TimescaleDBContainer, GrafanaContainer,
    SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartMotorEncoder, HoistMotorEncoder, ArduinoTemperatureSensor, ArduinoStatusSignal
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service produces optimized motion profiles which are sent via MQTT to the Control Application. The Control Application translates these into motor commands, relays them to the Arduino, and the Arduino drives the motor drivers. Alerts from the Continuous Validation Service are also routed to the HMI for operator action."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time control and logging occur at sub‑second intervals (≈10–100 ms). Trajectory planning operates on a slower timescale (seconds) to generate a full movement profile. Continuous validation runs concurrently with execution, evaluating data at the same sample rate as logging."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Five physical containers (Crane, Crane Interface, Control App, Logging App, HMI) and six digital twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker), all connected via Docker networking, with the MQTT broker acting as the central pub/sub hub and the database as the persistent telemetry store."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design‑time: CAD modelling and kinematic model creation.
Build‑time: Assembly of physical components and firmware upload to Arduino.
Commissioning: Initial connection, calibration of sensors, first trajectory tests.
Operational: Continuous validation, fault detection, logging, and user‑controlled motion.
Maintenance: Update of models, retraining of fault classifiers, firmware upgrades."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Simulation model verified against measured position and swing data; continuous‑validation computes Euclidean distance between measured and simulated trajectories and compares against a configurable threshold (e.g., 5 cm). Confidence bounds (upper/lower limits) shown in Grafana. Re‑validation loops ensure model fidelity over time. Detection of residual swing validates kinematic model and motor controller tuning."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical interface connects to Arduino via USB over UART; motor drivers and sensors plug into Arduino. Container services communicate over MQTT (TCP port 1883) and SQL (PGSQL port 5432) on Docker bridge network. All services run locally on a personal PC.

"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Local deployment on a Linux or Windows personal computer with Docker Desktop; all services containerized; database and broker auto‑initialised via docker‑compose. The repository hosts Dockerfiles and a `docker-compose.yml` for one‑click startup. No cloud hosting described."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "No explicit integration with external information systems or other digital twins is described in the provided documents.

"
]
